tasks.title: Codebase Analysis & Marketing Integration Points
tasks.description: Analyze DoctorMX platform architecture to identify user touchpoints, API endpoints, and integration opportunities for marketing automation.
tasks.details: Map every user journey from landing to consultation completion. Document AI doctor features with marketing angles. Extract unique value propositions.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all integration points work correctly with marketing automation tools.

tasks.title: Marketing Technology Infrastructure Setup
tasks.description: Deploy core marketing automation infrastructure including n8n workflows, analytics tracking, and data architecture.
tasks.details: Set up n8n for workflow automation, configure Supabase for user analytics, implement tracking pixels and conversion events.
tasks.testStrategy: Test all automation workflows and data collection mechanisms.

tasks.title: WhatsApp Business API Integration
tasks.description: Implement WhatsApp Business API for automated messaging, critical for Mexican market penetration.
tasks.details: Set up WhatsApp Business account, configure automated flows, implement conversation management.
tasks.testStrategy: Test message delivery, conversation flows, and compliance features.

tasks.title: User Registration & Onboarding Automation
tasks.description: Create automated user onboarding sequences with email capture and engagement triggers.
tasks.details: Build 7-email onboarding sequence, implement welcome WhatsApp messages, set up user scoring.
tasks.testStrategy: Test email delivery rates, message timing, and user engagement metrics.

tasks.title: Social Media Automation - Reddit Strategy
tasks.description: Implement automated Reddit engagement strategy for Mexican health subreddits.
tasks.details: Create karma building strategy, automated posting schedules, crisis response protocols.
tasks.testStrategy: Monitor engagement rates, karma growth, and community feedback.

tasks.title: Social Media Automation - Twitter/X Healthcare
tasks.description: Deploy Twitter automation for health crisis monitoring and influencer engagement.
tasks.details: Set up real-time health hashtag monitoring, automated thread creation, influencer outreach.
tasks.testStrategy: Test response times, engagement rates, and compliance with Twitter policies.

tasks.title: Content Marketing Engine Development
tasks.description: Build automated content generation and distribution system for health education.
tasks.details: Create 100+ article templates, SEO optimization, multi-platform distribution automation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test content quality, SEO performance, and distribution effectiveness.

tasks.title: Email Marketing Automation Workflows
tasks.description: Implement segmented email campaigns for different user lifecycles and health conditions.
tasks.details: Build abandoned consultation recovery, health tip newsletters, referral campaigns.
tasks.testStrategy: Test email deliverability, open rates, and conversion metrics.

tasks.title: COFEPRIS Compliance Automation
tasks.description: Implement automated compliance checking for Mexican healthcare regulations.
tasks.details: Build disclaimer insertion system, medical claim verification, license validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all content meets COFEPRIS requirements and legal compliance.

tasks.title: User Behavioral Tracking & Scoring System
tasks.description: Implement user engagement scoring and behavioral trigger system for personalized marketing.
tasks.details: Create user scoring algorithms, behavioral triggers, personalization engine.
tasks.testStrategy: Test scoring accuracy, trigger timing, and personalization effectiveness.

tasks.title: Geographic Targeting & Local Provider Integration
tasks.description: Build location-based targeting system for local healthcare provider recommendations.
tasks.details: Integrate location APIs, build provider database, create local targeting rules.
tasks.testStrategy: Test location accuracy, provider recommendations, and local relevance.

tasks.title: A/B Testing Framework Implementation
tasks.description: Deploy automated A/B testing system for campaigns, content, and user flows.
tasks.details: Build testing infrastructure, statistical significance calculators, automated optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify statistical accuracy, test automation, and result reporting.

tasks.title: Performance Analytics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create real-time dashboard for monitoring all marketing automation performance metrics.
tasks.details: Build comprehensive dashboard with KPIs, attribution modeling, ROI calculations.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data accuracy, real-time updates, and dashboard responsiveness.

tasks.title: Crisis Response Automation System
tasks.description: Implement automated response system for health crises and trending medical topics.
tasks.details: Build trend monitoring, automated content generation, rapid response protocols.
tasks.testStrategy: Test response speed, content relevance, and crisis management effectiveness.

tasks.title: Referral Program Automation
tasks.description: Create automated referral tracking and reward system to encourage user growth.
tasks.details: Build referral tracking, automated rewards, social sharing optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Test referral attribution, reward delivery, and program effectiveness.

tasks.title: Multi-Channel Attribution Modeling
tasks.description: Implement sophisticated attribution system to track user journey across all touchpoints.
tasks.details: Build cross-device tracking, touchpoint attribution, conversion path analysis.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify attribution accuracy, cross-device tracking, and data consistency.

tasks.title: Automated Customer Support Integration
tasks.description: Integrate marketing automation with customer support for seamless user experience.
tasks.details: Connect support tickets with user journey, automated escalation, satisfaction tracking.
tasks.testStrategy: Test support integration, escalation rules, and user satisfaction metrics.

tasks.title: Mexican Market Localization Automation
tasks.description: Implement cultural and regional customization for different Mexican markets.
tasks.details: Build regional content variations, local health topic customization, cultural adaptation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test regional relevance, cultural appropriateness, and local engagement.

tasks.title: Prescription & Medication Tracking Integration
tasks.description: Connect medication recommendations with marketing automation for follow-up campaigns.
tasks.details: Integrate prescription data, medication adherence tracking, automated reminders.
tasks.testStrategy: Test prescription tracking, reminder accuracy, and adherence improvement.

tasks.title: Influencer Partnership Automation
tasks.description: Build automated system for identifying, reaching out to, and managing health influencers.
tasks.details: Create influencer database, automated outreach, performance tracking, payment processing.
tasks.testStrategy: Test influencer identification, outreach effectiveness, and partnership ROI.

tasks.title: Competitive Intelligence Automation
tasks.description: Implement automated monitoring of competitor activities and market trends.
tasks.details: Build competitor tracking, pricing monitoring, feature comparison, market analysis.
tasks.testStrategy: Test monitoring accuracy, trend identification, and competitive insights.

tasks.title: Advanced Segmentation & Personalization
tasks.description: Implement AI-powered user segmentation and hyper-personalized marketing campaigns.
tasks.details: Build ML segmentation models, dynamic content personalization, predictive analytics.
tasks.testStrategy: Test segmentation accuracy, personalization effectiveness, and engagement lift.

tasks.title: Mobile App Integration & Push Notifications
tasks.description: Integrate mobile app events with marketing automation for push notification campaigns.
tasks.details: Connect app events, build push notification workflows, optimize delivery timing.
tasks.testStrategy: Test app integration, notification delivery, and engagement rates.

tasks.title: Revenue Attribution & ROI Optimization
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive revenue tracking and ROI optimization across all channels.
tasks.details: Build revenue attribution models, lifetime value calculations, ROI optimization algorithms.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify revenue tracking accuracy, attribution models, and optimization effectiveness.

tasks.title: Scalability Testing & Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Test system scalability for 10,000+ users and optimize performance bottlenecks.
tasks.details: Conduct load testing, optimize database queries, implement caching, monitor performance.
tasks.testStrategy: Test system performance under load, verify scalability, and optimize bottlenecks.
